mapper.sql: id, user_b_id AS userBId, user_id AS userId, username, phone_number AS phoneNumber, plan, license_plate AS licensePlate, commission_rate AS commissionRate, brand_id AS brandId, remake, order_number AS orderNumber, means_payments AS meansPayments, state, settle_accounts AS settleAccounts, fixloss_user AS fixlossUser, fixloss, creat_time AS creatTime, update_time AS updateTime
mapper.select:
SELECT t.* FROM( SELECT a.id indentId, a.order_number orderNumber, a.license_plate licensePlate, c.`name` brand, b.merchants_name merchantsName, a.settle_accounts settleAccounts, CONCAT('图片') url, a.creat_time createTime FROM app_indent as a LEFT JOIN app_b_user as b ON a.user_b_id=b.id LEFT JOIN app_car_brand as c ON a.brand_id = c.id WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId} AND a.state = 6 AND to_days(a.creat_time) = to_days(now()) union ALL
SELECT a.id indentId,clean_indent_number orderNumber,CONCAT('(洗车暂无车牌)') licensePlate,CONCAT('(洗车)')brand,b.merchants_name merchantsName, format(a.amount*0.9,2) settleAccounts,c.url url,a.create_time createTime FROM app_clean_indet as a LEFT JOIN app_b_user as b ON a.user_b_id = b.id LEFT JOIN app_merchants_info_banner AS c ON a.user_b_id = c.user_b_id WHERE a.user_b_id = #{userBId} AND c.`index` = 1 AND to_days(a.create_time) = to_days(now()) AND (a.indent_state = 3 or a.indent_state = 6) AND resource = 1 union ALL
SELECT a.id indentId,clean_indent_number orderNumber,CONCAT('(美容暂无车牌)') licensePlate,CONCAT('(美容)')brand,b.merchants_name merchantsName, format(a.amount*0.9,2) settleAccounts,c.url url,a.create_time createTime FROM app_clean_indet as a LEFT JOIN app_b_user as b ON a.user_b_id = b.id LEFT JOIN app_merchants_info_banner AS c ON a.user_b_id = c.user_b_id WHERE a.user_b_id = #{userBId} AND c.`index` = 1 AND to_days(a.create_time) = to_days(now()) AND (a.indent_state = 3 or a.indent_state = 6) AND resource = 2
union all SELECT a.id indentId,a.rescue_number orderNumber,a.license_plate licensePlate,CONCAT('(救援)')brand, c.merchants_name merchantsName,format(a.price*0.8,2) settleAccounts,b.url url, a.create_time createTime FROM app_rescue_indent as a LEFT JOIN app_rescue_img as b on a.type = b.type LEFT JOIN app_b_user as c ON a.user_b_id = c.id WHERE a.user_b_id = #{userBId} AND (a.state = 3 or a.state = 5) AND to_days(a.create_time) = to_days(now())
UNION ALL SELECT a.id indentId,spray_paint_number orderNumber,a.license_plate licensePlate,CONCAT('(喷漆)')brand, b.merchants_name merchantsName,format(a.price*0.8,2) settleAccounts,c.url url,a.create_time createTime FROM app_spray_paint_indent as a LEFT JOIN app_b_user as b ON a.user_b_id = b.id LEFT JOIN app_merchants_info_banner as c ON c.user_b_id = a.user_b_id WHERE c.`index` = 1 AND a.user_b_id = #{userBId} AND (a.state =8 or a.state = 9) AND to_days(a.create_time) = to_days(now())
UNION ALL SELECT a.id indentId,a.year_check_number orderNumber,a.license_plate licensePlate,CONCAT('(年检)')brand, b.merchants_name merchantsName,format(a.price*0.8,2) settleAccounts,c.url url, a.create_time createTime FROM app_year_check_indent as a LEFT JOIN app_b_user as b ON a.user_b_id = b.id
LEFT JOIN app_merchants_info_banner as c ON a.user_b_id = c.user_b_id WHERE c.`index` = 1 AND a.user_b_id = #{userBId} AND a.state = 6 AND to_days(a.create_time) = to_days(now())
) t ORDER BY t.createTime limit #{pagesize},20

SELECT t.* FROM( SELECT a.id indentId, a.order_number orderNumber, a.license_plate licensePlate, c.`name` brand, b.merchants_name merchantsName, CONCAT('') settleAccounts, CONCAT('') url, a.creat_time createTime FROM app_indent as a LEFT JOIN app_b_user as b ON a.user_b_id=b.id LEFT JOIN app_car_brand as c ON a.brand_id = c.id WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId} AND (a.state = 3 OR a.state = 4 OR a.state = 5 OR a.state = 6) union ALL
SELECT a.id indentId,clean_indent_number orderNumber,CONCAT('(洗车暂无车牌)') licensePlate,CONCAT('(洗车)')brand,b.merchants_name merchantsName, a.amount*0.9 settleAccounts,c.url url,a.create_time createTime FROM app_clean_indet as a LEFT JOIN app_b_user as b ON a.user_b_id = b.id LEFT JOIN app_merchants_info_banner AS c ON a.user_b_id = c.user_b_id WHERE a.user_b_id = #{userBId} AND c.`index` = 1 AND (a.indent_state = 3 or a.indent_state = 6) and resource = 1
union all SELECT a.id indentId,clean_indent_number orderNumber,CONCAT('(美容暂无车牌)') licensePlate, CONCAT('(美容)')brand,b.merchants_name merchantsName, a.amount*0.9 settleAccounts,c.url url,a.create_time createTime FROM app_clean_indet as a LEFT JOIN app_b_user as b ON a.user_b_id = b.id LEFT JOIN app_merchants_info_banner AS c ON a.user_b_id = c.user_b_id WHERE a.user_b_id = #{userBId} AND c.`index` = 1 AND (a.indent_state = 3 or a.indent_state = 6) and resource = 2
union all SELECT a.id indentId,a.rescue_number orderNumber,a.license_plate licensePlate,CONCAT('(救援)')brand, c.merchants_name merchantsName,a.price*0.8 settleAccounts,b.url url, a.create_time createTime FROM app_rescue_indent as a LEFT JOIN app_rescue_img as b on a.type = b.type LEFT JOIN app_b_user as c ON a.user_b_id = c.id WHERE a.user_b_id = #{userBId} AND (a.state = 3 or a.state= 5)
union all SELECT a.id indentId,spray_paint_number orderNumber,a.license_plate licensePlate,CONCAT('(喷漆)')brand, b.merchants_name merchantsName,a.price*0.8 settleAccounts,c.url url,a.create_time createTime FROM app_spray_paint_indent as a LEFT JOIN app_b_user as b ON a.user_b_id = b.id LEFT JOIN app_merchants_info_banner as c ON c.user_b_id = a.user_b_id WHERE c.`index` = 1 AND a.user_b_id = #{userBId} AND (a.state = 8 or a.state = 9)
UNION ALL SELECT a.id indentId,a.year_check_number orderNumber,a.license_plate licensePlate,CONCAT('(年检)')brand, b.merchants_name merchantsName,a.price*0.8 settleAccounts,c.url url, a.create_time createTime FROM app_year_check_indent as a LEFT JOIN app_b_user as b ON a.user_b_id = b.id
LEFT JOIN app_merchants_info_banner as c ON a.user_b_id = c.user_b_id WHERE c.`index` = 1 AND a.user_b_id = #{userBId} AND (a.state = 3 or a.state = 5)
) t ORDER BY t.createTime DESC limit #{pagesize},20

SELECT a.id indentId,a.order_number orderNumber,a.license_plate licensePlate,b.`name` brand,d.`name` referees,c.url url,state,a.creat_time createTime,date_format(a.creat_time,'%Y-%m')MonthTime FROM app_indent AS a LEFT JOIN app_car_brand as b on a.brand_id = b.id LEFT JOIN app_img AS c ON a.id = c.key_id LEFT JOIN app_user as d ON a.user_id = d.id WHERE a.user_b_id = #{userBId} AND c.type =2 AND c.`index` =1
AND (a.state = 4 or a.state = 5)
AND a.state = #{type}
AND CONCAT(IFNULL(b.`name`,''),IFNULL(a.license_plate,''),IFNULL(d.`name`,'')) LIKE "%"#{searchText,jdbcType=VARCHAR}"%"
ORDER BY a.creat_time DESC LIMIT #{pageSize},20

SELECT SUM(if((user_b_id = #{user_b_id}),1,0)) AS allIndent, SUM(if((user_b_id = #{user_b_id} AND to_days(creat_time) = to_days(now()) ),1,0)) AS todayIndent FROM app_indent as a where (a.state = 3 OR a.state =4 OR a.state = 5 OR a.state = 6)

SELECT a.id indentId, a.license_plate licensePlate, a.fixloss_user settleAccounts, a.order_number orderNumber, d.`name` brand, b.merchants_name merchantsName FROM app_indent AS a LEFT JOIN app_b_user as b ON a.user_b_id=b.id LEFT JOIN app_car_brand AS d ON a.brand_id = d.id WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId} AND a.state = 6 limit #{pageSize},20

SELECT a.id indentId, username, phone_number phoneNumber, license_plate licensePlate, b.`name` brand, plan, state, fixloss, settle_accounts settleAccounts, commission_rate commissionRate, fixloss_user fixlossUser, means_payments meansPayments, remake, rescue_them_fee rescueThemFee, responsibility, insurance_company insuranceCompany, send_unit sendUnit, send_people sendPeople, order_number orderNumber, creat_time createTime FROM app_indent AS a LEFT JOIN app_car_brand as b ON a.brand_id =b.id WHERE a.id = #{indentId}

SELECT SUM(if((user_b_id = #{userBId} AND TO_DAYS(creat_time) = TO_DAYS(NOW())),1,0)) todayIndent, SUM(if(state=6 AND user_b_id= #{userBId},settle_accounts,0))allEarnings, SUM(if((user_b_id = #{userBId}),1,0)) allIndentCount, SUM(if((user_b_id = #{userBId} AND state = 1),1,0)) newIntentCount, SUM(if((user_b_id = #{userBId} AND state = 3),1,0)) inServiceCount, SUM(if((user_b_id = #{userBId} AND state = 4),1,0)) obligationCount, SUM(if((user_b_id = #{userBId} AND state = 5),1,0)) toEvaluateCount, SUM(if((user_b_id = #{userBId} AND state = 2),1,0)) cancelledCount FROM app_indent

SELECT id indentId, state state, username name, phone_number phoneNumber, license_plate carId, plan plan, brand_id brand, fixloss fixloss, commission_rate commissionRate, settle_accounts settleAccounts, means_payments meansPayments, fixloss_user fixlossUser, rescue_them_fee rescueThemFee, responsibility, insurance_company insuranceCompany, send_unit sendUnit, send_people sendPeople, remake remake, settle_fours_company_rate settleFoursCompanyRate FROM app_indent WHERE id = #{indentId}
SELECT DISTINCT COUNT(1) FROM app_indent WHERE (user_b_id = #{id} OR up_id = #{upId})
SELECT DISTINCT SUM(fixloss) FROM app_indent WHERE (user_b_id = #{id} OR up_id = #{upId})
SELECT DISTINCT SUM(settle_accounts) FROM app_indent WHERE (user_b_id = #{id} OR up_id = #{upId});
SELECT DISTINCT SUM(settle_fours_company) FROM app_indent WHERE (user_b_id = #{id} OR up_id = #{upId});
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(fixloss),0) FROM app_indent WHERE user_id = #{id} and year(creat_time) = #{year} AND month(creat_time) = #{month}
